args.code: (() => { const before={}; const se=document.scrollingElement||document.documentElement; before.winTop=se.scrollTop; let target=null; document.querySelectorAll('main, [role="main"], div, section').forEach((el)=>{ const oy=getComputedStyle(el).overflowY; if((oy==='auto'||oy==='scroll') && el.scrollHeight>el.clientHeight+20){ if(!target||el.clientHeight>target.clientHeight) target=el; } }); const tBefore= target?target.scrollTop:null; (target||window).scrollBy(0, target?target.clientHeight:window.innerHeight); const tAfter= target?target.scrollTop:null; return JSON.stringify({ picked: target?target.tagName:'window', winTopBefore: before.winTop, winTopAfter: se.scrollTop, containerTopBefore: tBefore, containerTopAfter: tAfter, moved: (target? tAfter>tBefore : se.scrollTop>before.winTop) }); })()
